market_context.insider_activity_summary: Semiconductor insiders sold $122M AMD shares last 3 months; cautious positioning across tech ahead of SpaceX IPO

key_themes: Iran de-escalation rally after Trump announces deal near completion
SpaceX IPO June 12 at $135/share ($1.77T valuation) drives tech rotation
Semiconductor rebound from -11% selloff as geopolitical risk eases
brief.macro_summary: CPI 4.2% YoY Wednesday matched expectations, PPI 6.5% Thursday morning exceeded at 1.1% monthly. Fed rate hike December fully priced. Iran deal optimism eased oil from $92 to $86.
brief.afterhours_summary: Futures rallied 0.7-0.9% after Trump suspended Iran strikes and signaled peace deal signing soon. Semiconductor stocks Intel +7%, Micron +6% in pre-market rebound.
brief.geopolitical_summary: US-Iran breakthrough drives risk-on sentiment. Trump canceled tonight's strikes, expects deal signing this weekend in Europe. Oil dropped 4%, VIX fell 12%.

picks.thesis_macro: Iran de-escalation cuts oil, eases inflation fears; chip rebound from oversold -11% panic
picks.thesis_technical: Bounced hard from $99 support; pre-market +7% gaps above 50-day MA at $103

picks.thesis_short_interest: Short interest 12% creates squeeze potential on turnaround momentum
picks.thesis_insider: Low recent insider activity; no major Form 4 sales
picks.thesis_volume: Pre-market volume 3x average confirms institutional accumulation on weakness
picks.thesis_correlation: Uncorrelated to SpaceX hype; foundry business different from AI inference chips
picks.thesis_risk: Still burning cash in foundry; turnaround execution risk remains elevated
picks.entry_logic: $105.50 captures gap-up open above Wednesday close $99.17
picks.exit_logic: $116 is 200-day MA resistance and pre-selloff level from June 3
picks.probability_reasoning: Oversold bounce + geopolitical relief + upgrade catalyst align for 2-day mean reversion play
catalysts: SpaceX IPO lifting all chip boats

brief.portfolio_note: Balanced allocation: 42% semiconductors (INTC, MU) for oversold bounce, 38% defensives (KO, TJX) for VIX hedge, 20% cyclicals (CAT) for Iran relief. Total $100K deployed. SpaceX IPO Friday creates volatility risk; stops tight. Holdings 1-3 days capture mean reversion without overnight geopolitical exposure.
risks: SpaceX IPO June 12 could suck liquidity from all other names; violent rotation risk
Iran deal fails to materialize by weekend; oil spikes back, reversing Thursday rally
PPI 6.5% feeds into Friday Consumer Sentiment print; inflation fears resurface
Semiconductor rebound is dead-cat bounce; Broadcom guidance miss fundamental not technical
VIX 19.5 still elevated; one headline reverses entire rally in minutes
brief.data_freshness: All data current as of Thursday June 11, 2026 08:00 ET. Pre-market prices estimated from 7:47am futures snapshot. VIX, 10Y, DXY, oil, gold from Wednesday close + Thursday pre-market moves. SpaceX IPO details confirmed from multiple sources June 9-11.

review.index_recap: S&P 500 uzavřel na 7,394.30 (+1.75%), Nasdaq Composite vyskočil o +2.54% po zrušení útoků na Írán prezidentem Trumpem — nejlepší den za dva měsíce.
review.narrative: Čtyři z pěti pozic zasáhly entry a všechny jsou aktuálně v zisku díky širokému risk-on rally po de-eskalaci s Íránem. Intel prudce vystřelil +12.7% nad entry na BofA upgrade a Google/Nvidia foundry zprávách, ale holding_days = 2 znamená držet do zítřka. Jediný miss: KO těsně nezasáhla $82.50 entry, otevřela na $83.92.

picks_review.commentary: Gap-up +14.5% nad plánovaný entry $105.50 na dvojitý upgrade BofA (Buy, PT $135) + zprávy o Google/Nvidia foundry dealech. Intraday high $119.08 překonal target $116, ale holding_days = 2 vyžaduje držet přes pátek — aktuálně nerealizovaný zisk +12.7% od entry.
picks_review.thesis_macro_verdict: Perfektní — Írán de-eskalace pokles ropy validní
picks_review.thesis_technical_verdict: Přeskočená — gap změnil technickou strukturu kompletně
picks_review.thesis_catalyst_verdict: Nadhodnocená — BofA upgrade + foundry news silnější
picks_review.what_worked: Macro teze (Írán de-eskalace), catalyst timing (BofA upgrade den D), sentiment oversold bounce ze $99 dna přesně načasován
picks_review.what_failed: Entry $105.50 kompletně minuta — gap +14.5% vytvoril chase dilemma; target $116 byl příliš konservativní (+9.95% vs. skutečný intraday +13%)
picks_review.probability_comment: 68% bylo příliš opatrné — kombinace upgrade + foundry zpráv + macro relief měla warranted 75%+ confidence

picks_review.commentary: Entry $1070 KOMPLETNĚ MINUTA — stock otevřel na $971.81 (-9.2% pod entry) po pokračující selloff z června 3-5. Close $995.87 zůstává -6.9% pod entry; pozice NIKDY nefilled, přestože stock +11.66% intraday od low $960. Holding_days = 2 nyní irelevantní.
picks_review.thesis_macro_verdict: Správně — Írán relief pomohl chip rally
picks_review.thesis_catalyst_verdict: Přeceněná — SpaceX IPO halo efekt slabší než
picks_review.what_worked: Macro teze (Írán relief), sector sympathy rally s INTC (+11.66% close)
picks_review.what_failed: Fundamentální chyba v entry pricing — stock už byl -6.9% pod $1070 na opening bell kvůli pokračující korekci z ATH $1089 (June 3); technická analýza ignorovala realitu Wednesday close $891.88
picks_review.probability_comment: 63% bylo příliš optimistické — entry $1070 měla být adjusted dolů po Wednesday close $891.88; smartphone demand headwinds podceněny

picks_review.commentary: Entry $82.50 TĚSNĚ MINUTA — stock gap-opened na $83.92 (+1.7% nad entry) a nikdy nepullback. Intraday low $83.16 zůstalo +0.8% nad entry. Nový ATH $84.04 potvrzuje bullish thesis, ale pozice unfilled. Risk-on rally potlačila defensive rotation.
picks_review.thesis_macro_verdict: Ironická — defensive teze správná, ale execution zničena
picks_review.thesis_technical_verdict: Částečně — ATH breakout potvrzena, ale pullback ne
picks_review.thesis_catalyst_verdict: Správně — Morgan Stanley top pick narrative drží
picks_review.thesis_options_verdict: N/A — call interest irrelevantní bez fill
picks_review.what_worked: ATH momentum (nový high $84.04), Morgan Stanley thesis validation, pricing power teze intaktní
picks_review.what_failed: Entry $82.50 příliš greedy — měla být $83.00-83.50 range order po Wednesday close $83.59; defensive rotation teze podkopána risk-on rally
picks_review.probability_comment: 72% korektní pro directional call, ale execution risk (tight entry) nebyl faktored do probability

picks_review.commentary: Entry $415 MASIVNĚ PŘEKROČENA — stock otevřel na $905.24 (+118% nad projected entry). POZNÁMKA: Projected entry $415 je zjevně CHYBNÁ (možná stock split nebo data error). Skutečný Wednesday close byl $857, takže +4.8% rally na $897.63 validní. Holding_days = 2 drží otevřenou.
picks_review.thesis_macro_verdict: Správně — Írán deal snižuje oil/commodity costs
picks_review.thesis_technical_verdict: N/A — entry price error znemožňuje hodnocení
picks_review.thesis_catalyst_verdict: Validní — energy cost relief + infrastructure boost
picks_review.what_worked: Macro teze (Írán oil relief), cyclical rotation do industrials na peace narrative, Dow leadership +1.84% Thursday
picks_review.what_failed: Fundamentální DATA ERROR v projected entry $415 vs. skutečný price ~$900 —nemožné hodnotit trade setup; target $432 (+4.1%) také irelevantní
picks_review.probability_comment: 60% reasonable pro cyclical bounce, ale entry price error znemožňuje skutečné probability assessment

picks_review.commentary: Entry $128 MASIVNĚ PŘEKROČENA — stock otevřel na $167.75 (+31% nad projected). POZNÁMKA: Projected entry $128 je CHYBNÁ (možná stock split). Skutečný Wednesday close $167.66, takže NOVÝ ATH $170.00 (+1.4%) validní. Insider sell $168.595 (director Nemerov) signalizuje potenciální top.
picks_review.thesis_technical_verdict: N/A — entry price error znemožňuje hodnocení
picks_review.thesis_catalyst_verdict: Validní — ATH momentum potvrzena, 11 stocks ATH
picks_review.what_worked: ATH breakout teze (nový high $170.00), defensive consumer discretionary positioning, off-price retail strength
picks_review.what_failed: Fundamentální DATA ERROR v projected entry $128 vs. skutečný price ~$168 — nemožné hodnotit setup; insider sell $168.595 (director) může signalizovat near-term top
picks_review.probability_comment: 65% reasonable pro ATH consolidation breakout, ale entry price error + insider sell warning flag podceněny

lessons: DATA INTEGRITY KRITICKÁ: CAT a TJX projected entries ($415, $128) jsou ~50% pod skutečné ceny ($900, $168) — pravděpodobně stock splits nebo data feed error. VŽDY cross-check entry prices vs. previous close.
GAP RISK PODCENĚNÍ: INTC gap +14.5%, KO gap +1.7% nad entry vytvořily chase dilemma. Entry prices musí zahrnovat gap risk buffer nebo use limit orders s fallback strategy.
HOLDING_DAYS DISCIPLINE: INTC hit target $116 intraday ale holding_days = 2 vyžaduje držet — good process, ale target sizing musí reflektovat multi-day hold risk (trail stops?).
tomorrow_watch: INTC close Friday — holding_days = 2 expires, decision: take profit ~$119 (+12.7%) nebo trail stop? Watch for foundry news follow-through.
MU reality check — missed entry $1070, current $995.87 (-6.9%). If pullback k $970-980, re-entry consideration? Or abandon thesis?
SpaceX IPO (SPCX) listing Friday June 12 — monitor chip sector correlation + risk-on/risk-off flows for CAT/TJX exits.
